Source: bemap-services-v2/search/bemap-autocomplete-attach.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - Autocomplete input-attach helper (v1.5)
 *
 * Glue between a `<input type="text">` and `bemap.Autocomplete` /
 * `bemap.GeoAutocomplete`. Handles debouncing, in-flight cancellation
 * (`AbortController`), keyboard navigation (Up / Down / Enter / Esc) and
 * click-outside-to-close.
 *
 * **This is an OPTIONAL helper.** The service class itself
 * (`bemap.Autocomplete`) stays a pure HTTP mapper — call its
 * `autocomplete(request)` method directly when this glue is too opinionated
 * for your UI. Markers, icons, dropdown styling and result rendering are
 * the final developer's responsibility.
 *
 * Usage:
 *
 *   var ac = new bemap.Autocomplete(ctx);
 *   var handle = bemap.helpers.attachAutocompleteToInput(ac, inputEl, {
 *     onSelect: function(element) { ... }
 *   });
 *   // later: handle.destroy() removes listeners and the dropdown
 *
 * @since 1.5.0
 * @public
 * @param {bemap.Autocomplete|bemap.GeoAutocomplete} service
 * @param {HTMLInputElement} inputEl
 * @param {Object} options
 * @param {Function} options.onSelect Required. Called with the picked `bemap.AutocompleteElement`.
 * @param {Function} [options.onResults] Called with the raw result array on every keystroke that yields suggestions.
 * @param {Function} [options.onError] Called with a `bemap.Error` on network failures.
 * @param {Number} [options.debounceMs=250] Wait this long after the user stops typing before firing the request.
 * @param {Number} [options.minChars=2] Don't fire until the input has at least this many characters.
 * @param {bemap.Coordinate} [options.coordinate] Bias suggestions around this point (Flutter SDK: `coordinate`).
 * @param {bemap.Coordinate} [options.proximity] Alias of `coordinate` for parity with older code.
 * @param {bemap.BoundingBox} [options.boundingBox] Restrict suggestions to a bbox.
 * @param {Number} [options.radius] Maximum search radius in metres around `coordinate`.
 * @param {String} [options.countryCode] ISO country code filter.
 * @param {String} [options.language='en'] BCP-47 language code (ISO 639-1).
 * @param {Boolean} [options.addressDetails] Request structured PostalAddress per item.
 * @param {Boolean} [options.enableHighlights]
 * @param {Boolean} [options.enableCategories]
 * @return {{ destroy: Function }} Handle that unbinds every listener and removes the dropdown.
 */
bemap.helpers = bemap.helpers || {};

bemap.helpers.attachAutocompleteToInput = function(service, inputEl, options) {
    if (!service || typeof service.autocomplete !== 'function') {
        throw new Error('attachAutocompleteToInput: a bemap.Autocomplete / GeoAutocomplete instance is required');
    }
    if (!inputEl || inputEl.nodeType !== 1) {
        throw new Error('attachAutocompleteToInput: a real <input> element is required');
    }
    var opts = options || {};
    var debounceMs = (typeof opts.debounceMs === 'number') ? opts.debounceMs : 250;
    var minChars = (typeof opts.minChars === 'number') ? opts.minChars : 2;
    var typingTimer = null;
    var currentController = null;
    var currentFocus = -1;
    var listEl = null;

    function closeList() {
        if (listEl && listEl.parentNode) listEl.parentNode.removeChild(listEl);
        listEl = null;
        currentFocus = -1;
    }

    function renderList(items) {
        closeList();
        if (!items || !items.length) return;
        listEl = document.createElement('div');
        listEl.className = 'bemap-autocomplete-list';
        listEl.setAttribute('role', 'listbox');
        for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
            (function(item) {
                var row = document.createElement('div');
                row.className = 'bemap-autocomplete-item';
                row.setAttribute('role', 'option');
                row.textContent = item.getPlace() || '';
                row.addEventListener('mousedown', function(ev) {
                    ev.preventDefault();
                    inputEl.value = item.getPlace() || '';
                    closeList();
                    if (typeof opts.onSelect === 'function') opts.onSelect(item);
                });
                listEl.appendChild(row);
            })(items[i]);
        }
        if (inputEl.parentNode) inputEl.parentNode.appendChild(listEl);
    }

    function setActive(rows) {
        for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) rows[i].classList.remove('bemap-autocomplete-active');
        if (currentFocus < 0) currentFocus = rows.length - 1;
        if (currentFocus >= rows.length) currentFocus = 0;
        rows[currentFocus].classList.add('bemap-autocomplete-active');
    }

    function fireQuery() {
        var value = inputEl.value || '';
        if (value.length < minChars) { closeList(); return; }

        if (currentController && typeof currentController.abort === 'function') {
            try { currentController.abort(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
        }
        currentController = (typeof AbortController === 'function') ? new AbortController() : null;

        var req = new bemap.AutocompleteGeocodingRequest({
            place: value,
            coordinate: opts.coordinate || opts.proximity,
            boundingBox: opts.boundingBox,
            radius: opts.radius,
            countryCode: opts.countryCode,
            language: opts.language || 'en',
            addressDetails: opts.addressDetails,
            enableHighlights: opts.enableHighlights,
            enableCategories: opts.enableCategories
        });

        service.autocomplete(req, {
            signal: currentController ? currentController.signal : undefined
        }).then(function(response) {
            renderList(response.getItems());
            if (typeof opts.onResults === 'function') opts.onResults(response.getItems());
        }).catch(function(err) {
            if (err && err.getCode && err.getCode() === bemap.Error.ABORTED) return;
            if (typeof opts.onError === 'function') opts.onError(err);
        });
    }

    function onInput() {
        if (typingTimer) clearTimeout(typingTimer);
        typingTimer = setTimeout(fireQuery, debounceMs);
    }

    function onKeyDown(ev) {
        if (!listEl) return;
        var rows = listEl.querySelectorAll('.bemap-autocomplete-item');
        if (!rows.length) return;
        if (ev.keyCode === 40) { ev.preventDefault(); currentFocus++; setActive(rows); }
        else if (ev.keyCode === 38) { ev.preventDefault(); currentFocus--; setActive(rows); }
        else if (ev.keyCode === 13) {
            ev.preventDefault();
            if (currentFocus >= 0 && currentFocus < rows.length) {
                rows[currentFocus].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown'));
            }
        } else if (ev.keyCode === 27) {
            closeList();
        }
    }

    function onDocClick(ev) { if (ev.target !== inputEl) closeList(); }

    inputEl.addEventListener('input', onInput);
    inputEl.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown);
    document.addEventListener('click', onDocClick);

    return {
        destroy: function() {
            inputEl.removeEventListener('input', onInput);
            inputEl.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown);
            document.removeEventListener('click', onDocClick);
            if (typingTimer) clearTimeout(typingTimer);
            if (currentController && typeof currentController.abort === 'function') {
                try { currentController.abort(); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
            }
            closeList();
        }
    };
};
